projects.title: AI Diabetes Detection System
projects.description: Built a deep learning CNN model for diabetes detection. The system uses advanced image classification techniques to detect diabetic retinopathy from retinal images with high accuracy.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive deep learning solution for diabetes detection using Convolutional Neural Networks. The project involved data preprocessing, model architecture design, training, and validation. Achieved remarkable results in the Kufr El-Sheikh Olympics Competition.
projects.achievement: 2nd Place in Kufr El-Sheikh Olympics Competition

projects.title: Data Governance Platform
projects.description: Enterprise-scale data governance and metadata management platform built at Bussma Company. Features include automated documentation, logging systems, and bulk data operations.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive enterprise solution for managing data assets, metadata, and governance policies. Built with modern Java technologies and designed for scalability and performance.

projects.title: ML Analytics Pipeline
projects.description: Scalable machine learning analytics pipeline for data processing and model deployment. Integrates with cloud platforms for efficient data handling.
projects.longDescription: A robust analytics pipeline designed to handle large-scale data processing and machine learning model deployment. Features automated data validation, model training, and deployment workflows.
